gist.headline: Fresh off the press
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot just updated the README with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community apps.
gist.impact: Visitors to the repository will see the most up-to-date information about recent platform changes and community creations.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee acting as a newsboy or updating a bulletin board. A cute robot (Monitor Robot) helping pin up new papers.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap, pinning a fresh piece of paper to a wooden bulletin board. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a stack of papers. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
